title: calesiam acidum
intro: Calesiam acidum, also known as Coleus amboinicus, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Calesiam acidum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Calesiam acidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish for various dishes.
